mnemonics.title: Array Address Formula
mnemonics.content: FOR 1D: BASE + (i × SIZE) - READ AS 'BASE PLUS INDEX INTO SIZE'

mnemonics.title: Row-Major 2D Address
mnemonics.content: BASE + ((i × COLS) + j) × SIZE - THINK: 'I ROWS COMPLETE, THEN J IN CURRENT ROW'

mnemonics.title: Column-Major 2D Address
mnemonics.content: BASE + ((j × ROWS) + i) × SIZE - THINK: 'J COLUMNS COMPLETE, THEN I IN CURRENT COLUMN'

mnemonics.title: Array Features
mnemonics.content: CIA - CONTIGUOUS MEMORY, INDEXED ACCESS, ALWAYS SAME TYPE

acronyms.expansion: Contiguous - Elements stored in consecutive memory locations
acronyms.usage: Arrays provide CONTIGUOUS storage for elements

acronyms.expansion: Random Access - Direct access to any element using index
acronyms.usage: Arrays allow RANDOM ACCESS in O(1) time

acronyms.expansion: Homogeneous - All elements must be of same data type

visualTips.visualization: Draw arrays as consecutive boxes in a row. For 1D: [box1][box2][box3]... Each box has index below it starting from 0. For 2D: Draw as grid with row and column indices.
Row-major: FILL ROW BY ROW like reading a book. Column-major: FILL COLUMN BY COLUMN like water flowing down.
Think of dynamic array as a hotel with rooms. When full, move to bigger hotel (double size), copy all guests (elements) to new location, then add new guest.
Array name is like a street address. Adding 1 to pointer moves to next memory location (not next byte). For int (4 bytes), ptr+1 moves 4 bytes ahead.

analogies.analogy: Think of array like a row of numbered parking slots. Slot number is the index, car is the value. You can directly go to slot 5 without checking slots 1-4.
Array is like apartments in the same building - all next to each other. Linked list is like houses spread across a city - each house knows where the next one is.
Sparse matrix is like a concert hall with mostly empty seats. Instead of recording every empty seat, just record who is sitting and where.
Dynamic array is like an expandable shopping list. Start with small list, when full, create new bigger list and copy old items - automatically.
